_comment: CANONICAL source for weighting presets, business-type mapping, and module flags. If audit-sop.md §2 or README ever disagree with this file, THIS FILE WINS. Every weights vector must sum to 100 — the brand-audit workflow validates this at Phase 0 and pm-scorer re-validates before scoring.

business_type_map._comment: pm-brand-auditor's classifier emits one of these three types. Map to a preset via base_preset, or seo_variant when the seo_variant_rule is met. The orchestrator always confirms the recommended preset with the user before weights lock.

seo_variant_rule: Recommend the +SEO variant when BOTH hold: (a) the site has meaningful indexable content/category depth (blog, guides, or 20+ collection/service pages found in the crawl sample), AND (b) organic search is plausibly a top-2 traffic channel for the brand or its category per public estimators. Local always includes the SEO module. The user confirms regardless.

internal_rubrics._comment: Sub-module rubrics — pass-through categories. Each must sum to 100.

modules._comment: Flag-gated modules. Appendix modules NEVER change the /100 — they produce labelled sub-scores/appendix sections (SOP §2.4). baked_in extensions have no flag: they are standing method steps inside the named agent.

compliance.note: auto = ON when pm-brand-auditor detects a regulated vertical (vape/nicotine, alcohol, supplements, CBD, gambling, finance, pharma); extends pm-brand-auditor + a policy-matrix section

influencer.note: deep creator/UGC sweep — paid-partnership labels, collab inventory, affiliate detection; light signals are always captured by social-content-auditor

marketplace.note: Amazon storefront/reviews/brand-store audit for ecom brands; extends pm-brand-auditor + competitor-intel

seo_depth.note: hobo = run the global hobo-auditor/hobo-strategic-auditor alongside seo-auditor for flagship engagements (richer 07)

strategy_depth.note: full = chain global agents after dtc-strategist: offer-ladder-builder + funnel-architect -> 06b, gtm-rollout-planner -> 06c, market-wedge-finder folded into 06b when 2+ competitors

deck.note: STANDARD output — Finalise phase builds runs/<slug>/audit-deck.html from audit-deck-template.html with all 11 tabs. Pass deck:false only to skip for cheap/internal shakedown runs.

mode.note: reaudit = delta run — pm-scorer also writes 00b-delta-report.md comparing against the previous run's 00 + run-config.json

pm-brand-auditor: reputation & reviews sweep (all presets — Trustpilot/Google/Reddit sentiment + §3.7 velocity)
ad-teardown: offer-history probe via Wayback Machine (brand instance only, ~4 snapshots / 12 mo)
traffic-sov: share-of-search trend (Google Trends branded-query curves, brand vs competitors)
pm-scorer: benchmarks.md append (anonymised per-category metrics per run)
